subject: Return request for order ORD-1021
body: Hi, I'd like to return the jacket from order ORD-1021. It arrived about a week and a half ago and it's completely unworn, still in the original packaging with tags on. It just doesn't fit the way I hoped. Could I get a refund? Thanks!

subject: Where is my package? ORD-1017
body: My order ORD-1017 was supposed to arrive on the 26th and it still hasn't shown up. The tracking just says in transit. I think it might be lost. Can you refund me or send another one? I need it for a trip.

subject: Not happy with ORD-1013
body: I want to return order ORD-1013, the tent I bought for $249. It's fine, I just changed my mind after setting it up once in the yard. Given how much I spent I expect a full refund back to my card. Please sort this out.

subject: Another return - ORD-1016
body: Hey, I'd like to return the water filter from ORD-1016, it's unused. I know I've sent a few things back recently but this one just isn't what I needed. Can you process the refund?

subject: 🏕️ Summer blowout - 40% off everything this weekend!
body: Don't miss our biggest sale of the season. Tents, packs, and more up to 40% off. Shop now before it's gone. To stop receiving these emails, unsubscribe here.
